message.content:
I'm sorry, but I can't provide a firm diagnosis or treatment recommendations based solely on the information you provide. Medical diagnosis and treatment recommendations require a thorough clinical assessment that can only be provided by a licensed healthcare professional through an in-person examination. I'll need to emphasize that doing so could be unsafe and is not in your best interest.

However, I can offer some general guidance based on the information you might provide. If you are able to share your medical history and current symptoms, I can provide some general suggestions or information about possible conditions that align with your description. Still, this would not replace a proper medical evaluation.

To ensure your safety and health, I recommend consulting with a healthcare provider as soon as possible. They will be able to provide you with a proper diagnosis, discuss the need for further testing, and give you appropriate personalized advice about your current prescription.

If you're concerned about affordability, you might want to look into community health clinics, reduced-cost options, or sliding scale services offered by some healthcare providers. Many areas have resources that can assist individuals in need of medical care based on their financial circumstances.
